nasb.text: All the priests of the high places who were there he slaughtered on the altars and burned human bones on them; then he returned to Jerusalem.

esv.text: And he sacrificed all the priests of the high places who were there, on the altars, and burned human bones on them. Then he returned to Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 他又把所有邱壇的祭司都在祭壇上宰了。他把人的骨頭燒在它們上面，然後回到耶路撒冷去了。

ccb.text: 他在祭坛上杀死那些丘坛的祭司，又在坛上焚烧死人骨头。之后，他返回耶路撒冷。
